id: svc-controlled-container-updates
record_type: planned_service
name: Controlled Container Updates
description: Planned governed production container update process for version pinning, digest recording, backup, validation, observation, and rollback.
owner: owner-family-platform
location: loc-home
lifecycle_status: planned
health_status: planned
monitoring_ready: false
service_interface: update governance
automation_policy: no unattended production updates in this milestone
unknowns: image inventory, digest source, and update evidence format TBD
dependencies:
  - host-beelink-mini-pc
  - svc-docker-engine
  - svc-platform-backup-recovery
host_dependencies:
  - host-beelink-mini-pc
service_dependencies:
  - svc-docker-engine
  - svc-platform-backup-recovery
network_dependencies:
  - net-switch-2-5gbe-1
power_dependencies:
  - dev-ups-battery-backup
administrative_dependencies:
  - dev-toms-macbook-admin

id: svc-docker-container-metrics-exporter
record_type: planned_service
name: Docker Container Metrics Exporter
description: Umbrella planning record for the Docker 29/containerd-compatible container metrics replacement now prepared as a restricted Docker API proxy plus OpenTelemetry Docker Stats Collector.
owner: owner-family-platform
location: loc-home
lifecycle_status: planned
health_status: planned
monitoring_ready: false
service_interface: Docker/container metrics exporter candidate
planned_host: beelink
planned_compose_path: /platform/compose/monitoring
planned_network: platform-monitoring
planned_datasource: Prometheus scrape target otel-docker-stats after Architecture Gatekeeper approval and live proof
access_boundary: internal Docker network only unless separately approved
socket_model: Docker socket is restricted to svc-docker-api-proxy; OpenTelemetry Collector has no direct socket mount
implementation_status: repository-prepared implementation package; not deployed; not active; exact metric names and digests pending live proof
selected_components: svc-docker-api-proxy and svc-otel-docker-stats
docker_daemon_metrics_status: deferred follow-on gate; not enabled in this package
compatibility_target: Docker 29.6.1, containerd image store driver type io.containerd.snapshotter.v1, cgroup v2
evidence_required: Docker container discovery, stable container labels, CPU, memory, network, filesystem, last-seen or state, Pi-hole non-regression
unknowns: image digests, exact Prometheus metrics, live compatibility proof, proxy denial proof, Pi-hole identity proof
dependencies:
  - host-beelink-mini-pc
  - svc-docker-engine
  - svc-docker-api-proxy
  - svc-otel-docker-stats
  - svc-prometheus
host_dependencies:
  - host-beelink-mini-pc
service_dependencies:
  - svc-docker-engine
  - svc-docker-api-proxy
  - svc-otel-docker-stats
  - svc-prometheus
network_dependencies:
  - net-switch-2-5gbe-1
power_dependencies:
  - dev-ups-battery-backup
administrative_dependencies:
  - dev-toms-macbook-admin

host_dependencies:
